span.p: PoE Access Switches\n(Multiple Closets throughout venue)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: High-Density Dumb Dual-Band APs\n(500 – 3000+ APs)\n2.4 GHz + 5/6 GHz

span.p:
🟦 Blue thick lines = Fiber Backhaul
(Access Switches → Core + Core → WLC)

🟧 Orange thick lines = Copper + PoE
(APs → Access Switches, max 100m)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⚠️ DISTANCE & LATENCY (Stadium Critical)
• Recommended: < 20 ms RTT AP ↔ WLC
• WLC cluster placed ON-SITE
• Copper limited to ≤100 m to APs
• All long runs = low-latency fiber backbone
